focusAreas.title: Mechanical Engineering
focusAreas.description: Can talk about what we do for mechanical engineering stuff- 3D printing, rapid prototyping, modelling, FEA, etcetera etcetera.

focusAreas.title: Embedded Systems
focusAreas.description: Multi-sensor fusion, low-power Bluetooth (BLE) telemetry pipelines, 6-DOF IMUs, and custom capacitive flex arrays for real-time biomechanical data.

focusAreas.title: Clinical Medicine
focusAreas.description: Direct validation with clinical collaborators and Western faculty, focusing on objective recovery metrics and EHR-compatible clinical reporting.
